name: Telegram Mini App household and invite flows
description: Bring household list/detail, invite preview/accept, and `startapp`-driven household deep-link behavior to TMA without changing membership, role, or invitation rules.

planned: Map Telegram deep-link payload handling onto the current invite-token preview and accept model.
Preserve household role and membership rules already enforced by the worker.
Keep invite UX resilient for auth-first redirect and expired-token cases inside Telegram.

notes: This feature is the main TMA onboarding and sharing slice.
